data.title: UBCF and Brookfield launch 2025 Pink Bag Initiative - thousands touched, nationwide campaign for breast cancer patients and survivors.
data.description: A countrywide campaign promoting awareness about breast cancer is being conducted to provide comfort and support to patients and survivors. Taking place in Huntington Station, N.Y., on September 26, 2025, this initiative involves collaboration between the United Breast Cancer Foundation (UBCF) and Brookfield Properties. The campaign, known as the 2025 UBCF-Brookfield Pink Initiative, aims to reach a large audience to educate and raise awareness about breast cancer.

data.title: Aware Buildings launches electronic monitoring system for Manhattan Eruv with 142 sensors across 25 miles.
data.description: In a recent update from New York, it was reported that a two-year initiative has been carried out by Aware Buildings, a renowned provider of long-range wireless sensors, in collaboration with Manhattan Eruv, Inc. The project involved the strategic placement of 142 wireless sensors spanning a distance of 25 miles. These sensors aim to ensure the protection and preservation of tradition through effective leak detection and monitoring of building infrastructure. This extensive effort highlights the commitment to utilizing advanced technology, with an emphasis on safeguarding cultural heritage and enhancing safety measures.

data.title: Trump plans to increase H-1B visa cost to $100,000 by 2026, over ten times more than under Biden, impacting U.S. companies and foreign hiring.
data.description: In 2026, President Donald Trump plans to raise the cost of H-1B visas to $100,000, which is over ten times higher than during President Joe Biden's administration. The H-1B visa program, established in 1990, allows U.S. employers to temporarily employ foreign workers in specialty occupations like STEM fields. Over the years, amendments have been made to the program, such as introducing fees like a $500 fraud prevention fee in 2004 and ACWIA training fees ranging from $750 to $1,500. Before 2026, the cost to sponsor an H-1B visa varied based on factors like company size and visa type, ranging from $1,700 to $8,000. This increase in visa fees by President Trump could have a significant impact on U.S. companies hiring foreign talent and has received mixed reactions from his supporters.

data.title: Pony.ai granted permit in Dubai for autonomous driving trials, accelerating Middle East deployment.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, Pony.ai, a prominent player in autonomous driving technology, disclosed that it received approval from Dubai's Roads and Transport Authority (RTA) to carry out trials of autonomous driving on the city's thoroughfares. This significant advancement comes after the company's successful bid to obtain a permit for conducting trials in Dubai.

data.title: Ameresco and City of Olympia, Washington start $17M building retrofit project at Olympia Armory for safety upgrades.
data.description: Ameresco, Inc., a prominent energy solutions provider traded on NYSE under the symbol AMRC, has initiated a building retrofit project at Olympia Armory in Olympia, Washington. The project, valued at around $17 million and being carried out in multiple phases, aims to enhance safety features, and accessibility. The launch event was attended by city officials and local community members to mark the beginning of this significant endeavor in navigating the energy transition.

data.title: Trump administration may target more individuals, such as Dem donors George Soros and Reid Hoffman. Who's next in line?
data.description: The president hinted at the possibility of legal action against additional adversaries, such as prominent billionaire Democratic donors George Soros and Reid Hoffman. Speculation arises whether others might also come under legal scrutiny in the future.

data.title: Tappytoon collaborates with K-Pop group NEWBEAT for a music video based on BL webtoon Bullet Time, debuts Sep 26.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Contents First, known for Tappytoon, a global webtoon platform, revealed a unique partnership with K-pop boy band NEWBEAT. They are teaming up for an exclusive music video showcasing Tappytoon's original BL webtoon, Bullet Time. Set to debut on September 26, the music video will be released on Tappytoon's social media outlets and digital platforms. This collaboration combines NEWBEAT's hit song "Flip the Coin" with an animated storyline inspired by Bullet Time's cyberpunk universe. This initiative aims to bring the webtoon's world to life while engaging fans of both the webtoon and the band.

data.title: BlueLinx appoints Christina Corley to Board of Directors effective Sept 22, 2025. She will serve on key committees.
data.description: ATLANTA-- BlueLinx Holdings Inc. disclosed the appointment of Christina (Chris) Corley to its Board of Directors, marking her official start on September 22, 2025. Corley will bring her expertise to the Human Capital and Compensation as well as the Nominating and Governance committees. The company expressed enthusiasm regarding her addition, with Kim Fennebresque, BlueLinx's spokesperson, praising the move. It positions Corley as an independent director on the BlueLinx board.

data.title: RVi acquires Hitchcock Design Group, enhancing U.S. presence. Acquisition solidifies RVi as a key player with a large team. Transaction details not disclosed.
data.description: RVi Planning + Landscape Architecture (RVi) announced the acquisition of Hitchcock Design Group (HDG), a prominent landscape architecture, placemaking, and urban design firm. This move establishes RVi as a top player in the industry, boasting one of the largest teams in the United States dedicated to planning, landscape architecture, visioning/branding, and urban design. The transaction details were not revealed. HDG, based in Naperville, Illinois, is now part of RVi, enhancing the company's national presence.

data.title: MoneyHero Q2 earnings show revenue shift to insurance & wealth, achieving a $0.2 million net income with a 79% EBITDA improvement. CEO sees a profitable path ahead.
data.description: MoneyHero Ltd. has achieved significant progress in reshaping its business for sustainable, profitable growth, with its Q2 results showing positive net income and stronger margins. The company's revenue mix was optimized, with high-margin insurance and wealth verticals accounting for 27% of revenue, an increase of 5 percentage points year-over-year. For the three months ended June 30, MoneyHero reported a net income of $0.2 million, a significant improvement from a net loss of $12.2 million in the same period the previous year. Adjusted EBITDA improved by 79% year-over-year, with losses narrowed down to $2 million. MoneyHero operates personal finance comparison platforms in Southeast Asia, helping users find and compare financial products. The company's success was attributed to diversified revenue streams and smarter operations, driving it towards profitability.CEO Rohith Murthy commented on the progress made, emphasizing the positive direction the company is moving towards with its optimized revenue mix, improving margins, and disciplined operations playing vital roles in its growth. MoneyHero's digital insurance brokerage is also becoming a bigger part of its business mix, contributing to its positive financial performance.

data.title: TotalEnergies and Cognite are expanding their partnership to deploy Cognite's industrial AI platform across all TotalEnergies' upstream assets globally over three years.
data.description: Paris and Phoenix, Arizona - TotalEnergies, a global integrated energy firm listed on the Paris, London, and New York stock exchanges as TTE, revealed a fresh development in their alliance with Cognite, a prominent industrial AI company. This renewed agreement outlines a plan to implement the Cognite industrial data and AI platform across TotalEnergies’ operated upstream assets around the globe over the next three years. Encompassing all activities from drilling to production, the objective is to fully leverage the potential of this partnership.

data.title: Perimeter Medical showcases imaging tech at breast cancer summit in Toronto & Dallas with influential physicians. TSXV: PINK; OTCQX: PYNKF.
data.description: A prominent gathering of breast care physicians was held in Toronto and Dallas on September 26, 2025, to discuss best practices and advancements in patient care. Perimeter Medical Imaging AI, Inc. (TSXV: PINK) (OTCQX: PYNKF), a leading company in the industry, hosted the event. The company is at the forefront of utilizing AI technology for medical imaging and is currently operating commercially.
